/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread -shared -Wl,-soname,_roslz4.so -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib/python2.7/dist-packages/roslz4/_roslz4.so CMakeFiles/roslz4_py.dir/src/_roslz4module.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib: /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib/libroslz4.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 -lpython2.7 -llz4 /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
